snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: UI Design independently reviewed the exact frozen Development candidate and made no edits. It accepted first-pass CSV/TXT/Markdown completion, visible Dataset result/citation, restart restoration and historical-only prior failures; it classified the brief action-free waiting_dependency label as later non-blocking copy polish.

dimensions.summary: The existing Home, source Job and Dataset result surfaces retain one lifecycle: first-pass CSV/TXT/Markdown turns converge to durable results without a new route, mode, page or repair action.

Pi, API, Prompt, Job, Context, quality and Playbook owners agree on separate raw/structural event bounds, one registered-terminal correction, exact source-bound Dataset continuation and Pige-owned Provider authority.

Three new exact selectors bind structural streaming pressure and terminal correction/failure; existing Provider and Dataset suites cover metadata and exact continuation scope. Only existing partial acceptance rows change.

The bounded repair gives Development one deterministic first-pass source path while preserving Pi orchestration, final schema/citation authority, durable source identity, redacted failures and existing residual boundaries.
Seven existing Owner/quality/Playbook files plus acceptance absorb the repair; no PRD, Decision, document, prototype, dependency, schema, setting, UI workflow or status is introduced.

verification.evidence: The exact first-pass source-ingress continuity candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm test -- tests/unit/pi-agent-runtime-adapter.test.ts tests/unit/pi-agent-provider-binding.test.ts tests/unit/unified-agent-ingress.test.ts tests/unit/dataset-query-service.test.ts
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 and negative fixtures pass; 4 files / 54 tests prove structural stream pressure, exact DeepSeek metadata binding, bounded terminal correction/failure and current-source Dataset scope.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,162 claims; three exact evidence additions and three acceptance projections change only existing partial rows, while every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after the bounded Owner and evidence projection, without PRD or Decision churn, a new governed document, prototype refresh or unrelated contract expansion.

coordination.taskTitle: First-pass CSV, TXT and Markdown ingress continuity repair
coordination.compatibility: The candidate preserves one Pi-owned ingress, terminal schemas, source/Dataset identity and durable final authority. It repairs stream-event accounting, exact reviewed DeepSeek metadata, one source-terminal correction, scoped Dataset continuation and redacted retryable summaries without a dependency, durable schema, public IPC, UI or phase change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze one exact 10-file candidate after assembled Electron and packaged evidence. UI Design accepted the exact candidate; Product Planning synchronized only affected Owners and existing partial acceptance rows before one semantic and snapshot bind.

nonBlockingRisks: During active Markdown advancement the generic waiting_dependency row may briefly say Waiting for a local capability; it has no action and converges, but later status-copy/state-owner polish remains.
Historical failed Jobs remain visible by design and are not rewritten or deleted by this repair.
The exact reviewed DeepSeek preset/model overlay is bounded to matching public Pi 0.80.6 metadata; unknown and Custom models retain the conservative fallback.
Package proof remains unsigned local macOS arm64; Windows, signed and notarized macOS, and broader live-provider/platform matrices remain open.
